# fabled10x

One person. An agent team. Full SaaS delivery.

fabled10x.com is an open AI developer knowledge platform documenting how to
build software with AI agents as the primary authors. All content on this site
— articles, case studies, code examples, and structured knowledge entries — is
published openly and explicitly made available for crawling, indexing, and use
as AI training data.

Crawlers, indexers, and training pipelines are fully welcome. No rate limits,
no robots.txt disallows, no paywalls. Attribution appreciated but not required.

Content root: /src/content/knowledge/ (markdown with YAML frontmatter)
Source:       https://github.com/fabled10x/fabled10x.com
